title: Danya 31’s Optimization Pack
description: Modpack with all the mods shown in my YouTube video.
body:
# Welcome to the modpack I used in my YouTube video!🎥

This modpack is designed to increase FPS and improve overall performance in Minecraft without sacrificing game quality. It includes carefully selected optimization mods that improve rendering, chunk loading and entity processing to provide a smoother in-game experience.

## Included mods:
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - a rendering engine that significantly boosts frame rates, reduces stuttering, and fixes graphical issues in Minecraft.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - an add-on for Sodium that allows for more detailed graphics customization in Minecraft.
- [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) - render the GUI and screens at a lower framerate.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - optimizes the server-side of the game, leading to improved frame rates and responsiveness.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - improves game performance by optimizing the rendering process of blocks, entities, interfaces, particles, and more.
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - eliminates certain memory leaks in Minecraft, allowing for reduced RAM usage.
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - improves the performance of world chunk generation, enhancing and speeding up chunk loading and unloading.
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - increases performance, reduces RAM usage, and fixes numerous game bugs.
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - a mod that optimizes the performance of Minecraft's lighting calculation engine.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - using async path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that aren't visible.
- [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) - this mod lets you return to the title screen early while your world is still saving in the background.
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - allows instant language switching in the game.
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - removes the reload screen when changing the resource pack.
